description: Parse and normalize an address string into standard components using regex patterns to identify street, city, state, ZIP, and add default country
task_description:
Normalize this address to the standard format:
123 Main St., Apt 4B, New York, NY 10001

Return JSON with: street, city, state, zip, country

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `address` (str)

Your workflow MUST use these exact variable names: address

**CRITICAL - OUTPUT FORMAT (EXACT STRUCTURE REQUIRED):**
Your activity must return this structure:
```json
{
  "street": "123 Main St Apt 4B",
  "city": "New York",
  "state": "NY",
  "zip": "10001",
  "country": "USA"
}
```

**Rules:**
- Match this structure (field names, nesting, types) EXACTLY
- Values will vary by instance, but structure stays the same
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Do NOT change field names

inputs.name: address
inputs.description: Raw address string containing street address, apartment/unit, city, state, and ZIP code in any format

output.description: Returns normalized address components: {"street": "123 Main St Apt 4B", "city": "New York", "state": "NY", "zip": "10001", "country": "USA"}

workflow_spec.name: Address Normalizer
workflow_spec.description: Normalizes a raw address string into standard format with separated components (street, city, state, zip, country)
